description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with exaggerated upper body proportions, wearing a sleeveless tank top emblazoned with the word 'HULKAMANIA' in bold letters. He has a prominent mustache and a full beard, and his head is covered with a fitted bandana. The figure is dressed in fitted pants and simple shoes, with a wristband on one arm. His arms are slightly bent and hang loosely at his sides, and his facial expression is stern and focused. The overall appearance suggests a strong, athletic persona, reminiscent of a professional wrestler or bodybuilder.
description: A muscular adult male with a tank top, bandana, wristband, fitted pants, and shoes, exuding a strong, athletic presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top with 'HULKAMANIA' text, facial features, bandana, and wristband clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the muscular arm, profile of the face, and the bandana's fit over the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank top, bandana, and the figure's broad shoulders and back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wristband, muscular arm, and the side profile of the face and body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top, fitted pants, wristband, bandana
attribute_hairstyle: long hair extending from under bandana
